## What do you want?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the feature. -->

## Why do you want it?

<!--
- What problem does this solve?
- Who benefits? (you? other Thai developers? enterprise? contributors?)
- Is there a workaround today?
-->

## How should it work?

<!-- Mockups, ASCII, screenshots, or example API calls welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve this; why is your approach better? -->

## Priority

- [ ] 🔥 Must have — would use INNOMCP 10x more
- [ ] 🚨 High — would adopt for production
- [ ] ⚠️ Medium — nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low — future exploration

## Are you willing to PR this?

- [ ] Yes, I will send a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just discussing
